REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF ISSUE TO BE LESS THAN FULLY ADJUDICATED PURSUANT TO SECTION 437C(T) IS DENIED. TRIABLE ISSUES OF FACT EXIST AS TO THE SCOPE OF THE RELEASE, I.E. WHETHER THE PARTIES AGREED THAT AUGUST AND SEPTEMBER 2020 RENT WAS ENCOMPASSED IN THE OFFER, ACCEPTANCE AND RELEASE ACCEPTED IN OCTOBER 2020. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: KENNETH B. HUNT; COURT REPORTER: TAMARA WILLAT, CSR #4609, TAMARAWILLAT@SBCGLOBAL.NET, 415-272-1753. (D501)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION ; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support
Off Calendar Nov-17-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Thomas V. Loran III; Pillsbury Winthrop Shaw Pittman LLP; 415-983-1000; appearing on behalf of plaintiff 2100 Market-Church, LLC.
Rajan S. Trehan; Hueston Hennigan LLP; 213-788-4340; appearing on behalf of defendant Sonder USA Inc.

Court reporter: Tamara Willat, CSR #4609, tamarawillat@sbcglobal.net, 415-272-1753.

Defendant contests the court's tentative ruling. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is DENIED. Triable issues of fact exist as to the scope of the release, i.e. whether the parties agreed that August and September 2020 rent was encompassed in the offer, acceptance and release accepted in October 2020.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Court reporter: Tamara Willat, CSR #4609, tamarawillat@sbcglobal.net, 415-272-1753. (D501)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Of Issue To Be Less Than Fully Adjudicatedpursuant To Section 437c(T)
Off Calendar Nov-17-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Thomas V. Loran III; Pillsbury Winthrop Shaw Pittman LLP; 415-983-1000; appearing on behalf of plaintiff 2100 Market-Church, LLC.
Rajan S. Trehan; Hueston Hennigan LLP; 213-788-4340; appearing on behalf of defendant Sonder USA Inc.

Court reporter: Tamara Willat, CSR #4609, tamarawillat@sbcglobal.net, 415-272-1753.

Plaintiff contests the court's tentative ruling. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF ISSUE TO BE LESS THAN FULLY ADJUDICATED PURSUANT TO SECTION 437C(T) is DENIED. Triable issues of fact exist as to the scope of the release, i.e. whether the parties agreed that August and September 2020 rent was encompassed in the offer, acceptance and release accepted in October 2020.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Court reporter: Tamara Willat, CSR #4609, tamarawillat@sbcglobal.net, 415-272-1753. (D501)
